Package org.solenopsis.soap.enterprise

Class EntityMilestone

java.lang.Object
org.solenopsis.soap.enterprise.SObject
org.solenopsis.soap.enterprise.EntityMilestone
public class EntityMilestone extends SObject

Java class for EntityMilestone complex type

.

The following schema fragment specifies the expected content contained within this class.


 <complexType name="EntityMilestone">
   <complexContent>
     <extension base="{urn:sobject.enterprise.soap.sforce.com}sObject">
       <sequence>
         <element name="AttachedContentDocuments" type="{urn:enterprise.soap.sforce.com}QueryResult" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="BusinessHours" type="{urn:sobject.enterprise.soap.sforce.com}BusinessHours" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="BusinessHoursId" type="{urn:enterprise.soap.sforce.com}ID" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="CombinedAttachments" type="{urn:enterprise.soap.sforce.com}QueryResult" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="CompletionDate" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}dateTime" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="ContentDocumentLinks" type="{urn:enterprise.soap.sforce.com}QueryResult" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="CreatedBy" type="{urn:sobject.enterprise.soap.sforce.com}User" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="CreatedById" type="{urn:enterprise.soap.sforce.com}ID" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="CreatedDate" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}dateTime" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="ElapsedTimeInDays" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}double" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="ElapsedTimeInHrs" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}double" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="ElapsedTimeInMins" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}int" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="FeedSubscriptionsForEntity" type="{urn:enterprise.soap.sforce.com}QueryResult" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="Feeds" type="{urn:enterprise.soap.sforce.com}QueryResult" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="Histories" type="{urn:enterprise.soap.sforce.com}QueryResult" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="IsCompleted" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}boolean" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="IsDeleted" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}boolean" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="IsViolated" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}boolean" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="LastModifiedBy" type="{urn:sobject.enterprise.soap.sforce.com}User" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="LastModifiedById" type="{urn:enterprise.soap.sforce.com}ID" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="LastModifiedDate" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}dateTime" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="MilestoneType" type="{urn:sobject.enterprise.soap.sforce.com}MilestoneType" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="MilestoneTypeId" type="{urn:enterprise.soap.sforce.com}ID" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="Name" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}string" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="ParentEntity" type="{urn:sobject.enterprise.soap.sforce.com}sObject" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="ParentEntityId" type="{urn:enterprise.soap.sforce.com}ID" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="ProcessInstances" type="{urn:enterprise.soap.sforce.com}QueryResult" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="ProcessSteps" type="{urn:enterprise.soap.sforce.com}QueryResult" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="SlaProcess" type="{urn:sobject.enterprise.soap.sforce.com}SlaProcess" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="SlaProcessId" type="{urn:enterprise.soap.sforce.com}ID" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="StartDate" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}dateTime" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="SystemModstamp" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}dateTime" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="TargetDate" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}dateTime" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="TargetResponseInDays" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}double" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="TargetResponseInHrs" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}double" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="TargetResponseInMins" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}int" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="TimeRemainingInDays" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}double" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="TimeRemainingInHrs" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}string" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="TimeRemainingInMins" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}string" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="TimeSinceTargetInDays" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}double" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="TimeSinceTargetInHrs" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}string" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="TimeSinceTargetInMins" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}string" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="UserRecordAccess" type="{urn:sobject.enterprise.soap.sforce.com}UserRecordAccess" minOccurs="0"/>
       </sequence>
     </extension>
   </complexContent>
 </complexType>
